chroma_key.name: green
chroma_key.selection_reason: highest 1st-percentile subject distance among the 3 candidate(s) clearing the 96 erase radius

idle.action: near-static combat idle loop: frame 4 must be a visually identical duplicate of frame 1, with the exact same planted feet, spear tip coordinate, spear length and angle, shield face coordinate, guard, hand, cape silhouette, body height, and pose; frame 2 changes only the eyes for one blink, frame 3 changes only the chest by one subtle breathing step; never resize or reposition the weapon

attack.action: readable spear thrust: compact windup drawing the spear back, forward thrust, follow-through, recovery toward combat idle; shield stays on the left arm; body, shield, and spear only, no detached effects

hurt.action: brief impact recoil behind the raised shield: flinch backward, stagger, regain footing, settle toward combat idle; shield stays on the left arm; no counterattack and no detached effects

style: match the accepted idle anchor exactly: crisp 16-bit-inspired pixel art, identical proportions, outline weight, detail density, palette, pale ice-blue plate armor, frost pauldrons, ice spear, small angular shield, long white hair
